tree.name: Jared McCain
tree.tradeDescription: Acquired from 76ers for 2026 1st round pick (via HOU) and three second-round picks
tree.note: Duke product, drafted #16 overall by Philadelphia in 2024

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 1st Round Pick via HOU
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Houston in Russell Westbrook trade. OKC sent Westbrook to HOU for Chris Paul, 2024 1st, 2025 1st, 2026 1st, and pick swaps

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Most favorable of OKC/HOU/IND/MIA second-round picks

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via MIL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Houston in Victor Oladipo/Jeremiah Robinson-Earl trade. OKC sent Oladipo and JRE to HOU for Kevin Porter Jr., 2027 2nd (MIN), and 2028 2nd (MIL)
assetsGivenUp.note: Milwaukee's 2028 second-round pick, routed through Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: Victor Oladipo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Miami for cash considerations, along with 2029 and 2030 2nd round picks
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Heat for cap purposes

assetsGivenUp.name: Jeremiah Robinson-Earl
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from New York Knicks (who drafted him #32) for Rokas Jokubaitis and Miles McBride
assetsGivenUp.note: Villanova product. Drafted by NYK, traded to OKC on draft night.

assetsGivenUp.name: Miles McBride
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 36th overall by OKC using MIN's pick (via GSW in Kelly Oubre trade, Nov 2020). Traded to NYK with Jokubaitis for JRE.
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick chain: MIN owned → GSW (D'Angelo Russell trade, Feb 2020) → OKC (Oubre trade, Nov 2020)

assetsGivenUp.name: Kelly Oubre Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Phoenix in Chris Paul trade. Flipped to GSW (Nov 22) for picks including this one.

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Houston in Westbrook trade. Traded to Phoenix (Nov 2020) for Oubre, Rubio, and picks.

assetsGivenUp.name: Russell Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 4th overall by Seattle with their own lottery pick.
